records.ety: [NL., fr. L. pendulus hanging, swinging. See Pendulous.]

defs: A body so suspended from a fixed point as to swing freely to and fro by the alternate action of gravity and momentum. It is used to regulate the movements of clockwork and other machinery.
notes: ☞ The time of oscillation of a pendulum is independent of the arc of vibration, provided this arc be small.
